summary: Tested GTA 6 launch day celebration mode - all features working correctly. Backend launch-status APIs fully verified (7/7 tests pass). Frontend celebration overlay, LaunchBanner, Navbar badge, Hero state, Moderation Panel launch controls all functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All launch celebration features verified. Backend GET/PUT /api/system/launch-status works. ?celebrate=1 URL param triggers overlay immediately. CelebrationOverlay shows LEONIDA IS NOW LIVE title, confetti, auto-dismiss 14s bar, Explore/Leaderboard buttons, dismiss X. LaunchBanner shows after overlay dismissed. Navbar shows 'NOW LIVE!' badge when isLaunched. Hero transforms to launched state with 'You're now in' + LAUNCHED NOV 19, 2026 + 'GTA VI Is HERE!' subtitle. Moderation Panel shows Launch Controls with Trigger Launch!/Disable Launch toggle and fires celebration on click. Widget page at /widget shows standalone countdown (pre-launch state, no celebration as it checks backend which has manual_override=false).
features_tested: PUT /api/system/launch-status - admin auth required, sets manual_override
?celebrate=1 URL param triggers celebration overlay immediately
CelebrationOverlay: LEONIDA IS NOW LIVE title, confetti, progress bar, dismiss button, Explore/Leaderboard buttons
LaunchBanner shows after overlay dismissed - GTA VI IS LIVE! green bar
Landing page hero launched state - 'You're now in', LAUNCHED NOV 19 2026 badge, GTA VI Is HERE! subtitle
Navbar NOW LIVE! pulsing green badge when isLaunched
Moderation Panel Launch Controls section with status display
Moderation Panel Trigger Launch! fires celebration overlay
Moderation Panel state changes to Disable Launch after trigger
Widget page shows standalone countdown (no celebration in pre-launch state)
